forbidden_changes: do not add global survival bonus without progress gating
do not only scale all coefficients
do not treat partial_progress as success_like
do not construct success_like preference pairs based on low-confidence labels
required_changes: restructure approach_progress to strongly penalize early_failure (e.g., add negative bias when progress is small or when speed/angle are large); ensure margin between partial_progress and early_failure is widened

replace terminal_reward with separate crash_penalty (sufficiently negative, e.g., -10 or more) and safe_landing_bonus (stringent conditions: both legs, very low speed, small angle, leg contact sustained)
preserve progress-conditioned gating and components: proximity_bonus, near_stability, leg_bonus, low_progress_timeout

expected_effect: Separate progress, stability, and terminal terms based on analyzer intent.
risk: Delta terms may be noisy if the progress proxy is imperfect.
